name: Validate Story Graph
description:
Programmatically analyzes story topology to check reachability, dead ends, orphans, missing targets, and lifecycle status. Provides concrete data for structural validation without requiring LLM reasoning about graph structure.

Checks:
1. Reachability - Can all nodes be reached from entry?
2. Dead ends - Nodes with no outgoing connections
3. Orphans - Nodes with no incoming connections (except entry)
4. Missing targets - References to non-existent nodes
5. Lifecycle status - What state are the paths in?

Returns structured analysis with actionable recommendations.

include_drafts.description: Whether to include draft lifecycle nodes in analysis

entry_anchor.description: Optional explicit entry point anchor. If not provided, nodes with no incoming connections are treated as entry points.

has_reachable_stable_node.description: Whether any reachable node is in a stable state (approved/cold)

reachable.description: Anchor IDs reachable from entry points

unreachable.description: Anchor IDs not reachable from any entry point

dead_ends.description: Anchor IDs with no outgoing connections

orphans.description: Anchor IDs with no incoming connections (excluding entry points)

by_lifecycle.description: Nodes grouped by lifecycle state (draft, approved, cold, etc.)

nodes.description: Detailed node information keyed by anchor ID

lifecycle_state.description: Current lifecycle state (draft, approved, cold, etc.)

outgoing.description: Target anchor IDs this node connects to

incoming.description: Source anchor IDs that connect to this node

examples.description: Validate from specific entry point, excluding drafts
